summary: Dark, low-light aerial rescue footage, much of it in a reddish or thermal-style palette, looking down from an aircraft onto a snow- and ice-covered surface. Indistinct figures and objects appear against the brightly lit ground as the camera hovers overhead. The footage is consistent with the described Coast Guard aircrew rescue of people from a small vessel trapped on ice near Chefornak, Alaska.

script.scene: Aerial view down onto a snowy surface with indistinct figures, lit in a reddish low-light palette.
Continued overhead footage of figures and objects on the ice.
A small bright object is hoisted in the foreground as the camera hovers above the ground.
